zh.lifeSummary: 當Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge於大約1270年出生在丹麥維波格哈奧德林諾特時，他的父親Niels Jakobsen Bugge37歲，母親Andersdatter27歲。他和Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1332年1月10日在丹麥維波格奧利比享年63歲，埋葬在丹麥維波格奧利比利比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge于大约1270年出生在丹麦維波格哈奧德林諾特时，他的父亲Niels Jakobsen Bugge37岁，母亲Andersdatter27岁。他和Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1332年1月10日在丹麦維波格奧利比享年63岁，埋葬在丹麦維波格奧利比利比。

nameMeanings.name: Bugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Thor.  German Hans, Kurt.
Danish: habitational name from a place so named in Denmark, or from the personal name Buggi, a short form of various German compound names.
Norwegian: of Danish origin (see 1 above), or a habitational name from the farm name Bogge of uncertain origin or from a shortened form of the placename Bugøynes in Finnmark.

variants.name: Bugg
meanings: English: nickname for an uncouth or weird man, from Middle English bugge ‘hobgoblin, bogy, scarecrow’.

nameMeanings.name: Bugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Thor.  German Hans, Kurt.
Danish: habitational name from a place so named in Denmark, or from the personal name Buggi, a short form of various German compound names.
Norwegian: of Danish origin (see 1 above), or a habitational name from the farm name Bogge of uncertain origin or from a shortened form of the placename Bugøynes in Finnmark.

variants.name: Bugg
meanings: English: nickname for an uncouth or weird man, from Middle English bugge ‘hobgoblin, bogy, scarecrow’.

nameMeanings.name: Nielsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Niels, Jorgen, Knud, Lars, Nels, Bent, Borge, Holger, Ove, Einer, Oluf.
Danish, Norwegian, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Niels, a shortened form of Nikolaus (see Nicholas ). Compare Nielson , Neilsen , Nelsen , Nilsen , and Nilson .

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Neilsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Ejnar, Gurli, Jorgen, Nels, Niels.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Nielsen  . Compare   Neilson   3.

variants.name: Nelsen
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages as either a patronymic from   Neil   or a metronymic from   Nell .  Use as a given name probably began as a tribute to the British admiral  Lord Nelson  (  1758–1805 ), the victor of the Battle of Trafalgar;  see also  Horatio .  It is, however, now much more common in the United States than in Britain, its popularity there in the 1930s and 40s no doubt having been influenced by the American film actor and singer  Nelson Eddy  (  1901–67 ). Nowadays the name is universally associated with the South African statesman  Nelson Mandela  (  b. 1918 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge was born about 1270, in Hegnet, Tøndering, Harre, Viborg, Denmark, his father, Niels Jakobsen Bugge, was 37 and his mother, Andersdatter, was 27. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne. He died on 10 January 1332, in Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Denmark, at the age of 63, and was buried in Lyby, Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge est né environ 1270, à Hegnet, Tøndering, Harre, Viborg, Danemark, son père, Niels Jakobsen Bugge, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Andersdatter, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1332, à Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Danemark, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Lyby, Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge um 1270 in Hegnet, Tøndering, Harre, Viborg, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Niels Jakobsen Bugge 37 und seine Mutter Andersdatter 27. Er hatte mit Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1332 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Dänemark und wurde in Lyby, Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge è nato il circa 1270 nel Hegnet, Tøndering, Harre, Viborg, Danimarca, il suo padre, Niels Jakobsen Bugge, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Andersdatter, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne. Morì il 10 gennaio 1332, nel Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Danimarca, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Lyby, Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Knight Bugge Nielsen Buggeが約1270年にデンマークヴィボルグハーアトoンデリングヘグネットで生まれた時，父Niels Jakobsen Buggeは37歳，母Andersdatterは27歳であった。彼はNielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierneとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1332年1月10日にデンマークヴィボルグンoアリビーで63歳で死去し，デンマークヴィボルグンoアリビーリビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge(이)가 대략 1270년 덴마크 비볼그 해르 트o더잉 헤그넷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Niels Jakobsen Bugge(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Andersdatter(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 1월 10일 덴마크 비볼그 o르 리비에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 비볼그 o르 리비 리비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Hegnet, Tøndering, Harre, Viborg, Dinamarca, seu pai, Niels Jakobsen Bugge, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Andersdatter, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1332, em Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Dinamarca, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Lyby, Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge родился около 1270 г. в местности хегнет, тoндиринг, харр, виборг, Дания, его отцу по имени Niels Jakobsen Bugge было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Andersdatter, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne. Он умер 10 января 1332 г. в местности либи, нoрр, виборг, Дания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности либи, либи, нoрр, виборг, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Knight Bugge Nielsen Bugge nació aproximadamente 1270, en Hegnet, Tøndering, Harre, Viborg, Dinamarca, su papá, Niels Jakobsen Bugge, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Andersdatter, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Nielsine Nielsdatter Gyldenstierne. Murió el 10 de enero de 1332, en Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Dinamarca, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Lyby, Lyby, Nørre, Viborg, Dinamarca.
